test_cases.description: Simple 1-hop — individual directly owns 100% of entity
test_cases.pass_criteria: Identifies single UBO at 100% with path length 1

test_cases.description: 2-hop chain — Individual owns 60% of Entity A, Entity A owns 80% of Entity B

test_cases.pass_criteria: No UBOs returned — 20% is below the 25% threshold

test_cases.description: Chain exceeds max hops — ownership chain is 6 levels deep
test_cases.pass_criteria: Flags chain_exceeded_max_hops and requires human review

test_cases.description: Unresolved chain — intermediate entity has no inbound OWNS relationship
test_cases.pass_criteria: Flags unresolved chain and requires human review

test_cases.description: UBO with PEP flag — must surface the flag
test_cases.pass_criteria: PEP flag is surfaced in UBO result and triggers human review

test_cases.description: Entity not in graph — should return error
test_cases.pass_criteria: Returns validation error — entity does not exist

test_cases.description: Custom threshold — 10% threshold should return more UBOs
test_cases.pass_criteria: Lower threshold surfaces additional UBOs that were below 25%

test_cases.description: Audit log verification — every traversal must produce audit_log_ref
test_cases.pass_criteria: audit_log_ref is present — confirms immutable logging
